mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET last_login_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, last_login_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE users
nickname = #{nickname},
phone = #{phone},
birth_date = #{birthDate},
profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl},
password = #{password},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users
nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET role = #{role}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
